ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transit_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transit line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the transit line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transit line */,
  "route_map" TEXT /* URL or path to a map of the line's route */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the line */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the line's data was updated */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the line is currently active */,
  "number_of_stations" INTEGER /* The total number of stations on the line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transit line the station is part of */,
  "platform_count" INTEGER /* The number of platforms at the station */,
  "accessibility_features" TEXT /* Features that make the station accessible (e.g., elevators, ramps) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the station's data was updated */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station is currently active */,
  "latitude" REAL /* The latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* The longitude of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES transit_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transit_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status record */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transit line */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the status record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the status record */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the status record */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the status record */,
  "qtr" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year when the record was taken */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the line (e.g., On-time, Delayed) */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* The reason for any delays */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* The estimated arrival time if delayed */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* The actual arrival time */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* The ID of the vehicle (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transit_status_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES transit_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transit_status_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ridership_data" (
  "ridership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ridership record */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transit line */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ridership record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the ridership record */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the ridership record */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers on the line */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station (if the data is per station) */,
  "hourly_passengers" INTEGER /* The number of passengers per hour */,
  "peak_hour" TEXT /* The peak hour of the day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the ridership data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ridership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ridership_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ridership_data_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES transit_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* The number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is locked due to failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, logout, view report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transit line associated with the metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the metric record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the metric record */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., On-time Rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the metric record */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the metric record */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* The type of metric (e.g., operational, financial) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the metric was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_metrics_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES transit_lines ("line_id")
)
